testcase.name: test_quota_blocks_3day_sick

failure.message: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for -: 'str' and 'str'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter3_assets_leave_discipline.py:150: in test_quota_blocks_3day_sick r = hr_client.post('/leave/new/', { /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:1156: in post response = super().post( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:499: in post return self.generic( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:671: in generic return self.request(**r) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:1090: in request self.check_exception(response) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:805: in check_exception raise exc_value /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/handlers/exception.py:55: in inner response = get_response(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/handlers/base.py:197: in _get_response response = wrapped_callback(request, *callback_args, **callback_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/views/generic/base.py:105: in view return self.dispatch(request, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/contrib/auth/mixins.py:73: in dispatch return super().dispatch(request, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/views/generic/base.py:144: in dispatch return handler(request, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ leave/views.py:129: in post proposed = used + _half_day_count(provisional) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ leave/views.py:29: in _half_day_count days = Decimal(leave.duration_days) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ core/models.py:366: in duration_days return (self.end_date - self.start_date).days + 1 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for -: 'str' and 'str'

testcase.name: test_quota_progressive

failure.message: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for -: 'str' and 'str'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter3_assets_leave_discipline.py:167: in test_quota_progressive r = hr_client.post('/leave/new/', { /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:1156: in post response = super().post( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:499: in post return self.generic( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:671: in generic return self.request(**r) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:1090: in request self.check_exception(response) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/test/client.py:805: in check_exception raise exc_value /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/handlers/exception.py:55: in inner response = get_response(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/handlers/base.py:197: in _get_response response = wrapped_callback(request, *callback_args, **callback_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/views/generic/base.py:105: in view return self.dispatch(request, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/contrib/auth/mixins.py:73: in dispatch return super().dispatch(request, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/views/generic/base.py:144: in dispatch return handler(request, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ leave/views.py:129: in post proposed = used + _half_day_count(provisional) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ leave/views.py:29: in _half_day_count days = Decimal(leave.duration_days) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ core/models.py:366: in duration_days return (self.end_date - self.start_date).days + 1 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for -: 'str' and 'str'
